title: Project Life Week 10

body:
The uneasy feeling I have about falling behind in this project is slowly creeping up. Reminding myself to keep it simple and stick with the plan. The plan is to keep it simple and just get it done. The light was fading on me as I photographed these pages so I didn't finish the last couple bits of journaling, but it's okay because I wanted to record some thoughts I may have blurred out anyway.

supplies: Pebbles spinach corrugated cardboard stickers, Goodness Thickers, Lilybee skinny abc's,  Ormolu flappers, clouds + hearts washi tape, thin washi tape.

From my stash came the rest, including the "10" in Bam Pop stamps. Pulling out old stuff and actually using the supplies I've had since I started scrapbooking 5 years ago is one of my favorite things to do. As far as new stuff goes though, the clouds + hearts tape will be showing up on a plethora of projects coming up. You've been warned. You can see all my Project Life posts here.
